title: Specify topology.lock
description: Validates `.specify/topology.lock`, the committed projection of each member project's identity, regenerated by `specify workspace sync`. Each project carries its authored intent (`description`) plus a deterministic structural projection of its baseline (`surface[]` from `.specify/specs/`, `recent[]` from the journal ledger). Machine-written (write-if-changed); operators never hand-edit it. Workspace plan-time topology (`workspace_topology`) reads this cache rather than `registry.yaml`.

version.description: Topology lock schema version. Version 1 is the initial shape.

projects.description: One entry per registry member project, in registry order. Each is the resolved projection of that project's `project.yaml`.

decision.description: One accepted Decision Record projected into routing identity. Title only — no body, Context, or Consequences prose is projected.

surfaceDomain.description: One baseline domain's projected surface: the domain slug and a bounded sample of its requirement titles.

requirements.description: Requirement-block headings of this domain's `spec.md`, in `REQ-NNN` id order, capped at K (default 8). Titles only — bodies, `Sources:`, and `Status:` are never projected.

more.description: Count of requirement titles elided past the cap. Absent when the domain fits within K.

platform.description: Closed target platform enum. `core` is the shared Rust business-logic crate; `ios`, `android` are supported shell platforms; `web`, `desktop` are future placeholders.

name.description: Registry slot name — the binding key written to `plan.yaml.slices[].project`. Identity stays the registry name, not `project.yaml.name`.

target.description: The project's target adapter in `name@<semver>` form, resolved from its `project.yaml.adapter`.

description.description: Single-sentence domain characterisation from the project's `project.yaml`. Omitted when the project declares none.

surface.description: Deterministic baseline surface: one entry per `.specify/specs/<domain>/spec.md`, sorted by domain slug. Empty stays off the wire (greenfield).

recent.description: The last M (default 10) `slice.archive.created` outcome summaries from the project's journal ledger, in append order. Empty stays off the wire.

decisions.description: Accepted Decision Records projected from `.specify/decisions/`: the most recent K (default 8) in `DEC-NNNN` ascending order. The third routing-identity axis — why the project is shaped the way it is. Empty stays off the wire.

decisions-more.description: Count of accepted decisions elided past the K cap. Absent when the catalogue fits within K.

platforms.description: Target platforms this project builds for, projected from `project.yaml.platforms`. Empty stays off the wire (non-platforms targets omit the field).
